title: Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas, Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas, White & Case act on Bagmane REIT ₹3,405 crore IPO
description: Bagmane Prime Office REIT has raised ₹3,405 crore from an initial public offering, comprising a fresh issue aggregating to ₹2,390 crore and an offer for sale aggregating to ₹1,015 crore by BREP Asia III India Holding Co VIII Pte. Ltd.Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas & Co advised Bagmane REIT, its investment manager Bagmane Realty Investment Manager Private Limited, and the sponsor Bagmane Realty and Infrastructure LLP, on this IPO.The transaction team was led by Nikhil Naredi (Partner) and Rohit
